mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_ai_log (user_id, scene, request_body, response_body, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, duration_ms, status, error_msg, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{scene}, #{requestBody}, #{responseBody}, #{promptTokens}, #{completionTokens}, #{totalTokens}, #{durationMs}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, sysdate())
